message:
🐛 Add client-side SHA check for developer channel update notifications (#1274)

The kc-agent Homebrew binary doesn't include /auto-update/status yet, so
developer channel update checks always returned null. This adds a fallback
that fetches the latest main branch HEAD SHA directly from the GitHub API
and compares it with the build-time commit hash.

- Fetch HEAD SHA from GitHub refs API (with auth token if available)
- Cache SHA in localStorage for offline fallback
- Compare build commit hash with remote main HEAD
- Show green update badge in navbar when SHAs differ
- UpdateIndicator uses latestMainSHA for developer channel display

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
